name: Fan Gu Xiao Gou Qiu Tie Tie
overview:
To reclaim her company, Shen Qing Ci enters a flash marriage with the notorious Beijing heir Xi Xing Ye. On the very first day after obtaining their marriage certificate, Xi Xing Ye lays out three strict rules for her. No one expected that a year later, the once-playboy young master would be wearing Shen Qing Ci’s favorite suit, holding her in his arms and pleading, “Wife, I want a cuddle… even just for one minute.”

Through their chaotic yet tender daily interactions, the two gradually break down their barriers and grow from a contractual couple into genuine lovers.

trailers.title: 為拿回公司，沈青瓷閃婚了臭名昭著的席家太子爺席星野，領證當天這位爺霸氣放話「婚期一年，你凈身出戶」，她欣然答應，怎料1年後民政局門口一身反骨的男人卻放下紈絝姿態委屈巴巴：老婆，財產歸你，不離婚好不好？
